description: Hivemind hooks — cross-session learning extraction and application

hooks.prompt: A subagent just completed work. Review what it accomplished. If it discovered something non-obvious — a workaround, a gotcha, a pattern, a project-specific fact — that would help OTHER agents in future sessions, run: sqlite3 ~/hivemind.db "INSERT INTO learnings (category, rule, context, source_session, confidence) VALUES ('<category>', '<the learning>', '<context>', 'auto:subagent', 0.7)" and also: sqlite3 ~/hivemind.db "INSERT INTO messages (sender, recipient, channel, content, msg_type) VALUES ('auto:subagent', '*', 'learnings', 'AUTO-LEARNED: <the learning>', 'learning')" — Only store genuinely useful discoveries, not obvious things. If nothing was learned, do nothing.
